mapper.sql: id, do_id, order_id, order_item, num, ass_num, do_source, do_type, wait_type, warehouse_code, gather_warehouse_code, customer_no, do_status, carried, express_code, province, city, district, street, address, linkman, mobile, phone, remark, version, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, spceial_flag, hope_date, pakage_type, ext_num, user_no, postcode, order_count, dlv_entire, is_wms, wl_date, corder_no, ext_ro_id, spceial_num, do_state, do_state_detail, dlv_site, dept_no, exp_dlv_type, exp_link_no
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_do_bak
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_do_bak (id, do_id, order_id, order_item, num, ass_num, do_source, do_type, wait_type, warehouse_code, gather_warehouse_code, customer_no, do_status, carried, mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_do_bak
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
do_id = #{record.doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
num = #{record.num,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ass_num = #{record.assNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
do_source = #{record.doSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_type = #{record.doType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wait_type = #{record.waitType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gather_warehouse_code = #{record.gatherWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_status = #{record.doStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
carried = #{record.carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
express_code = #{record.expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
province = #{record.province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{record.city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
district = #{record.district,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
street = #{record.street,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{record.address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
linkman = #{record.linkman,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mobile = #{record.mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{record.phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{record.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
spceial_flag = #{record.spceialFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
hope_date = #{record.hopeDate,jdbcType=DATE},
pakage_type = #{record.pakageType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ext_num = #{record.extNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_no = #{record.userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
postcode = #{record.postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_count = #{record.orderCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dlv_entire = #{record.dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_wms = #{record.isWms,jdbcType=INTEGER},
wl_date = #{record.wlDate,jdbcType=DATE},
corder_no = #{record.corderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ext_ro_id = #{record.extRoId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
spceial_num = #{record.spceialNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
do_state = #{record.doState,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_state_detail = #{record.doStateDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dlv_site = #{record.dlvSite,jdbcType=CHAR},
dept_no = #{record.deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exp_dlv_type = #{record.expDlvType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
exp_link_no = #{record.expLinkNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_do_bak
do_id = #{doId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
num = #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ass_num = #{assNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
do_source = #{doSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_type = #{doType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wait_type = #{waitType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gather_warehouse_code = #{gatherWarehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_status = #{doStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
carried = #{carried,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
express_code = #{expressCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
district = #{district,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
street = #{street,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
linkman = #{linkman,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
spceial_flag = #{spceialFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
hope_date = #{hopeDate,jdbcType=DATE},
pakage_type = #{pakageType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ext_num = #{extNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_no = #{userNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
postcode = #{postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_count = #{orderCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dlv_entire = #{dlvEntire,jdbcType=CHAR},
is_wms = #{isWms,jdbcType=INTEGER},
wl_date = #{wlDate,jdbcType=DATE},
corder_no = #{corderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ext_ro_id = #{extRoId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
spceial_num = #{spceialNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
do_state = #{doState,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
do_state_detail = #{doStateDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dlv_site = #{dlvSite,jdbcType=CHAR},
dept_no = #{deptNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exp_dlv_type = #{expDlvType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
exp_link_no = #{expLinkNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
